title: Web board: support editing after edges (TickCreate/TickUpdate + cloud round-trip)
description:
Routed from epic o16 final review (nit 2). The board renders after edges but cannot edit them: internal/tickboard/ui/src/comms/types.ts ~lines 81-101 TickCreate/TickUpdate carry blocked_by but not after, and cloud.ts ~lines 296-309 updateTick builds the wire tick field-by-field so after never round-trips from a cloud edit.

Work: add after?: string[] to TickCreate and TickUpdate; include after in cloud.ts updateTick field mapping; expose the field in the board create/edit forms next to the blocked-by input (same input pattern, label "After (soft order)"); ensure clearing works (empty -> omitted). Follow CLAUDE.md: pnpm, ticks-* components, bubbles+composed events, Catppuccin Mocha.

Semantics reminder for UI copy: after = preference (work these first if feasible), never blocks readiness.

Note: src/comms type drift has a pre-existing tracked tick (vy0) — do not widen scope to unrelated tsc errors.

Test cases: create with after -> persisted; edit set/clear -> round-trips through local and cloud paths (mock comms tests exist in src/comms); roadmap view reflects the change after edit.
Files likely touched: internal/tickboard/ui/src/comms/types.ts, src/comms/cloud.ts, the create/edit form component(s), tests alongside; rebuild embed via scripts/build-ui.sh.
Run: cd internal/tickboard/ui && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit && targeted vitest.
acceptance_criteria: after settable/clearable from board create+edit forms; cloud updateTick round-trips after; targeted vitest + tsc pass
